issues.description: Card has two distinct effects but effects array is empty. First effect: cost reduction conditional on trash count (should trigger on play or hand evaluation). Second effect: Blocker keyword with associated trigger. Both must be represented in DSL.

Missing effect for cost reduction: 'If you have 15 or more cards in your trash, give this card in your hand −3 cost.' Requires Trigger (likely OnPlay or Activated), condition TrashCount >= 15, action PowerBoost with -3 modifier.
Missing Blocker keyword effect. Should include trigger OnAttacked, condition Always, action Rest with blocker mechanic, or represent as GiveKeyword 'Blocker'.
